name: addyosmani/agent-skills
description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
readme_summary: Curated production-grade skills/prompts for AI coding agents covering code review, refactoring, testing, security audits and documentation generation.

name: apple/container
description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. Written in Swift, optimized for Apple silicon.
readme_summary: Apple's native container runtime for macOS leveraging lightweight VMs for near-native Linux container performance on Apple silicon.

name: google/skills
description: Agent Skills for Google products and technologies.
readme_summary: Official Google agent skill definitions for Gemini-powered coding agents, covering GCP, Android, Firebase and Chrome extension development.

name: activeloopai/hivemind
description: One brain for all your agents
readme_summary: Unified memory and context sharing layer for multi-agent AI systems, enabling persistent shared state across agent swarms.

name: cpaczek/skylight
description: Project aircraft passing overhead onto your ceiling in real time via RTL-SDR, with live sky layer (sun, moon, stars, ISS).
readme_summary: Real-time aircraft tracking projected onto a ceiling display using RTL-SDR radio, featuring celestial body overlays and ISS tracking.

name: diffusionstudio/lottie
description: Generate production-ready Lottie animations with Claude Code or Codex.
readme_summary: AI-powered Lottie animation generator that transforms natural language prompts into production-ready vector animations for web/mobile.

name: jd-opensource/JoyAI-Echo
description: Pushing the Frontier of Long Audio-Visual Generation.
readme_summary: JD open-source project for long-form audio-visual content generation, focusing on coherent multi-modal generation beyond short clips.

name: shadcn/improve
description: Use your most capable model to audit your codebase and write plans for cheaper models to execute.
readme_summary: Multi-tier AI coding strategy where a powerful model analyzes and plans, while cheaper models execute the implementation tasks.

name: NoopApp/noop
description: Offline WHOOP companion — pair your strap over Bluetooth, keep all data on your own device. No cloud, no account, no subscription.
readme_summary: Privacy-first fitness tracker companion that keeps all biometric data local, bypassing cloud dependencies for WHOOP devices.

name: superloglabs/superlog
description: Open-source observability tool that uses AI agents to self-heal your software.
readme_summary: AI agent-driven observability platform that autonomously detects anomalies, diagnoses root causes and suggests or applies fixes.

name: MSNightmare/RoguePlanet
readme_summary: Proof-of-concept exploit for a Windows Defender vulnerability demonstrating bypass techniques for endpoint security.

name: rustdesk/rustdesk
description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.
readme_summary: Cross-platform remote desktop solution with end-to-end encryption, supporting self-hosted relay servers for privacy-conscious organizations.
